title: Dr. Beckmann Stain Devils Fruit & Drinks | With active oxygen booster | 50g
features: Targets & removes stains such as red wine, coffee, tea, fruit and vegetable stains as well as juice, hot chocolate, mould and mildew stains
Suitable for washable and non-washable fabrics
Tough on stains, gentle on colours and fabrics
description: Product Description "The Dr. Beckmann Stain Devils Fruit & Drinks is specially developed with an active-oxygen booster that bleaches and removes the stain effectively in a colour and fabric-friendly manner. Ideal for stains such as; coffee, tea, red wine, fruit juices, jam as well as stains like mildew and mould. Not suitable for: LEATHER, SUEDE, ACETATE/RAYON, CARPETS OR UPHOLSTERY. HOW TO USE IT: WASHING MACHINE: 1. Moisten stain, sprinkle with powder and remoisten. 2. Remove powder after approx. 60mins. For stubborn stains leave for longer, but keep stain wet. 3. Wash fabric as normal. NON-WASHABLE FABRICS: 1. Add powder directly to stain and remove after approx. 60mins. 2. Remove excess powder & dab the stained area thoroughly with a damp cloth. SOAKING: 1. Dissolve all the powder in 7l of warm water. 2. Soak the whole garment for several hours. Then rinse or wash as normal. IMPORTANT INFORMATION: - Stain removal should be carried out before washing. - Before use: test for colour fastness & material compatibility on an inconspicuous area. - Always follow fabric care instructions. - Do not treat stains on sensitive surfaces. - Place a suitable item underneath (e.g. saucer with clean cloth). ECO CONTRIBUTION: - 100% recyclable bottle excludes labels - 0% chlorine bleach, perfume & dyes - Made with 100% renewable electricity" Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: 15 – 30 % Oxygen-based Bleaching Agent. Directions Thoroughly moisten stain with water. Sprinkle powder onto stained area and work into the stain (wear rubber gloves if necessary). After 3 minutes brush off powder using a clean cloth, and dab until clean. (If necessary, repeat above process leaving powder on for 30 minutes) See more
